neighborhoods.name: Finikoudes / City Center
neighborhoods.description: Palm-lined seafront promenade with cafes, restaurants, and the medieval Larnaca Castle

housing.predominantType: Apartments in mid-rise buildings near the seafront

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Larnaca. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Oroklini
neighborhoods.description: Coastal village east of Larnaca with a salt lake, quieter beaches, and new residential developments
neighborhoods.character: Quiet coastal suburban, nature nearby, family-oriented

housing.predominantType: Modern villas, townhouses, and apartment complexes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Larnaca's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Aradippou
neighborhoods.description: Inland municipality with lower costs, local markets, and easy access to Larnaca city
neighborhoods.character: Inland suburban, affordable, local Cypriot character
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Mackenzie
neighborhoods.description: Beach area near the airport with bars, restaurants, and a popular stretch for plane-spotting and sunbathing
neighborhoods.character: Beach lifestyle, social, younger expat crowd
neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
